name: api-client
// targets: to see all targets run: nx show project api-client --web

metadata.description: Runs type-checking for the project (lib + spec — this project has no vite.config, so @nx/vite/plugin does not infer a typecheck target; spec is included, with --skipLibCheck to silence unrelated node_modules/nx .d.ts noise pulled in transitively by vitest.config.mts, so the @ts-expect-error compile-time regressions in fetch-json.spec.ts are actually enforced).
